Description: Program execution is interrupted due to an unhandled or improperly propagated exception
Program continues execution but produces wrong behavior or reaches an invalid state
Related root causes: Incorrect Handling Action; Missing Exception Raising Condition

Description: Error messages are inaccurate incomplete or obscure the actual failure cause
Failure occurs due to API dependency or Python version differences
Related root causes: API-Related Exception Handling Errors; Python Version Compatibility Issue

Description: Resources are not properly released or cleanup logic is incorrectly executed
The exception is suppressed or handled too broadly hiding the underlying problem
